messages.content: Yes, I can help you translate your transcript. Please provide the transcript in the original language and let me know which language you would like it to be translated into.
Certainly! Please provide the transcript that you would like to be translated into English, and I will assist you.
河北经贸大学学业成绩表
Transcript of Academic Records from Hebei University of Economics and Business.
Academic Degree: Currently pursuing a postgraduate degree.
获得河北经贸大学2021-2022学年第一学期校奖学金。
Received the Hebei University of Economics and Business Scholarship for the 2021-2022 academic year, first semester.
Received the honor of being a "Three Good Student" at the university.
Captain of the college women's basketball team.
